text.title: Linear Issue Tracking (PM Agile) Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Linear Issue Tracking (PM Agile) end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where relevant) a decision-gate.

step.name: provision-workspace
step.action: Create one workspace; invite team; pick one team URL.

step.name: set-cycle
step.action: Set cycle_length_days to 7 or 14; pin cycle start day.

step.name: define-states
step.action: Pin canonical 6-state set; remove default extras.

step.name: wire-integrations
step.action: Connect bidirectional; verify PR → issue linkage works.
